nasb.text: Then the man brought the men into Joseph’s house and gave them water, and they washed their feet; and he gave their donkeys fodder.

esv.text: And when the man had brought the men into Joseph’s house and given them water, and they had washed their feet, and when he had given their donkeys fodder,

cnv.text: 管家把他們領到約瑟的家裡，給他們水洗腳，又給他們飼料餵驢。

ccb.text: 接着带他们进约瑟的家，给他们水洗脚，给他们的驴喂草料。

csbs.text: 那人就把这些人带到约瑟家里，给他们水洗脚；又给他们的驴子饲料。
